data.title: Anchorage Digital's associated address transferred 2 million ENA to Binance, worth $1.16 million
data.description: Arkham data shows that about three hours ago, an address associated with Anchorage Digital transferred 2 million ENA to Binance, worth $1.16 million. In the past three days, the address has transferred a total of 10 million ENA to Binance, worth $5.9 million. The address currently holds approximately 15.313 million ENA (US$8.87 million).

data.title: Bitcoin Price Forms Bearish Evening Star Pattern On Weekly Chart, But Can Price Go Below $100,000?
data.description:
Market expert Tony Severino has raised some concerns with the current Bitcoin price action on the weekly chart. This comes as the flagship crypto trades below $110,000, with predictions that it could further drop below the psychological $100,000 level. Bitcoin Price Forms Bearish Pattern On Weekly Chart Severino revealed in an X post that the Bitcoin price is potentially forming an Evening Star pattern on the weekly chart, something he is wary of. He noted that this pattern is forming right at the Bollinger Band basis line, at around $111,600, during the tightest BB squeeze in BTC’s history
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-bearish-evening-star/

data.title: Decentralized perpetual contract Bluefin's trading volume exceeded $78 billion, and the token BLUE rose by more than 40% in a day.
data.description: Bluefin, a decentralized perpetual contract platform, announced that its cumulative trading volume has surpassed $78 billion. Meanwhile, the platform's total deposits have exceeded $220 million, and the number of interacting wallets has surpassed 2.2 million. Furthermore, market data indicates that its BLUE token has seen a daily increase of over 40% and is currently trading at 0.125 USDT.

data.title: Health Care Firm Hacked, Affecting 211,000 Americans – Names, Birthdays and Other Personal Info Stolen: Report
data.description:
A US-based health care company says it has been hacked, exposing 211,000 of its clients personal information. On July 3, 2025, UI Community HomeCare told clients that someone gained unauthorized access to the computer system of the University of Iowa Community HomeCare, an affiliate of the company.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/09/27/health-care-firm-hacked-affecting-211000-americans-names-birthdays-and-other-personal-info-stolen-report/

data.title: Russia raids crypto exchange offices in Moscow City
data.description:
Russian law enforcement agencies are raiding the offices of crypto exchange operators in the Moscow City business center, seizing cash and looking for people. According to sources close to Russia’s security services, the operation is linked to an ongoing investigation into illegal transfer of funds to foreign countries. Russian police search crypto exchange offices in […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-raids-crypto-exchange-offices-moscow/

data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. Assistant Director of the Hong Kong Monetary Authority: The Hong Kong government's third batch of tokenized bonds may be included in CBDC subscriptions; 2. Peter Schiff: Bitcoin's year-to-date gains have lagged behind precious metals such as gold and silver, and it may have been in a long-term hidden bear market; 3. El Salvador has increased its holdings by 8 BTC in the past 7 days, bringing its total holdings to 6,332.18; 4. Bitdeer mined 108.3 BTC this week, increasing its total Bitcoin holdings to 1,997.5; 5. ether.fi repurchased a total of 127,000 ETHFI this week, bringing the total agreed repurchase amount to over US$7.1 million to date; 6. Richard Byworth, partner of Syz Capital, withdrew his investment from the Bitcoin ETF and MSTR to Metaplanet; 7. US Secretary of Commerce: Trump may forgive Musk but will not forget the negative impact.
